commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a post-npm-update scan of recorded npm plugin installs, relinks missing `openclaw` peers using the existing helper, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows an npm update can run for one target and return without scanning sibling npm install records, and the PR body supplies real managed-root proof with Codex, Discord, and Brave peer links restored.
